name: Local Crisis Survival Planner
summary: Location-aware survival checklist generator for blackouts, infrastructure disruptions, and emergency preparedness.
description: Local Crisis Survival Planner helps individuals and households prepare for emergencies such as blackouts, infrastructure failures, and emerging risks. It generates clear, actionable checklists for water, food, medicine, and essential supplies while referencing trusted sources like FEMA and local government agencies. Designed for simplicity, it produces printable survival plans with no coding required.
conversation_starters: Create a 3-day blackout survival plan for my household
Checklist for water, food, and medicine for 7 days
What should I do in the first 24 hours of a blackout?
List official emergency resources for my location
limitations: Does not replace official emergency instructions
Requires user verification of local guidance
